content.en:
Shiying Daozu was taken away by Xuanhe Daozu, he didn't resist, even if he resisted, he couldn't resist.

Xuanhe Dao Ancestor is the top supreme Dao Ancestor, and no matter how strong Shi Ying Dao Ancestor is, he is far from being the opponent of Shi Ying Dao Ancestor.

The Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor and the Eightfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor seem to be only one heaven apart, but the difference in strength is too much.

The Eightfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor is known as the Supreme Dao Ancestor, but the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor does not have any title, which is enough to explain the problem.

Under normal circumstances, the level of the Dao Ancestor is one weight difference in the combat power of the Heavens, even if it can't be beaten, it can still escape, but the Seventh Heaven meets the Eightfold Heaven Supreme Dao Ancestor, and under normal circumstances, it can't run, unless the top Seventh Heaven Dao Ancestor meets the Eightfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor who has just broken through, then it may be able to contend with it, but it is only barely a few moves, and once it is a long time, it will still be defeated.

Therefore, Shi Ying Dao Ancestor knew that there was no point in resisting.

......

Many people in other forces thought that Shi Ying Dao Ancestor had suffered on his own, obviously refining the Forbidden Void Realm, but deliberately treating it as if he had not refined, maybe some people would have doubts, but they were not sure.

However, Ye Tian felt that Shi Ying Dao Ancestor might really not have refined the Forbidden Void Realm, Shi Ying Dao Ancestor was also a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he would soon be promoted to an Eightfold Dao Ancestor, and he would not be so stupid to betray the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Moreover, the Forbidden Void Realm was important to a force, but not to an individual, and there was no need for the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor to monopolize the Forbidden Void Realm.

Therefore, he believed that someone else must have occupied the Forbidden Void Realm.

This small Forbidden Void Realm only allowed Dao Ancestors below the Eighth Heaven to enter, and ordinary Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors really did not have the ability to secretly refine the Forbidden Void Realm without attracting the attention of others.

But Ye Tian believed that there was one person who could do such a thing, and that was Ouyang Jiu'er.

From the opening of the Forbidden Void Realm to the present, he had never seen Ouyang Jiu'er.

With Ouyang Jiu'er's temperament, she shouldn't miss such an opportunity, after all, she has never disliked the abundance of forbidden and strange things, and she will definitely come to collect forbidden and strange things.

At this time.

The Forbidden Void Realm has been refined by people and completely sealed off.

Not to mention that the Supreme Dao Ancestors themselves can't get in, even if they can, they can't get in now.

As a result, the Dao Ancestors of one by one forces left.

Ye Tian also returned to the Terran Territory, he didn't go to Ouyang Jiu'er, even if Ouyang Jiu'er refined the Forbidden Void Realm, it had nothing to do with him!

So, it's best not to ask.

However, after a few months, Ouyang Jiu'er actually took the initiative to come to Ye Tian.

"Brother Ye, I'll take you to a place!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said mysteriously.

Ye Tian had a guess in his heart and followed Ouyang Jiu'er away.

Soon, the two crossed the Void and came to another Void World.

As soon as Ye Tian came in, he knew that this was the Forbidden Void Realm.

"This is the Forbidden Void Realm, and sure enough, it was Jiu'er who refined the Forbidden Void Realm!" Ye Tian muttered.

"That's right, it's the Forbidden Void Realm that I refined!"

Ouyang Jiu'er nodded.

Under Ouyang Jiu'er's narration, Ye Tian finally understood how Ouyang Jiu'er had refined the Forbidden Void Realm.

It turned out that Ouyang Jiu'er had a treasure, the Town Boundary Monument, which came from the Dark Forbidden Realm, which could suppress the origin of all worlds, even the origin of the Forbidden Void Realm would also be suppressed by it.

So, Ouyang Jiu'er came to the Forbidden Void Realm with the Town Boundary Monument, directly suppressed the origin of the Forbidden Void Realm, and then secretly infiltrated the origin of the Forbidden Void Realm, forcibly refining the origin of the Forbidden Void Realm, so as to control the Forbidden Void Realm.

Since the origin was suppressed, the Forbidden Void Realm could not give birth to a vision at all, and there was no way to expose Ouyang Jiu'er's existence.

As for the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor's refining of the Forbidden Void Realm, Ouyang Jiu'er knew about it from the beginning, and deliberately let him refine it to attract her attention.

In fact, the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor had no way to refine it successfully.

In order to let Shi Ying Dao Ancestor carry the black cauldron, Ouyang Jiu'er deliberately made him feel that he was about to succeed in refining, and then silently moved the other Dao Ancestors out one by one, and moved the last one out of Shi Ying Dao Ancestor.

In this way, everyone would feel that Shi Ying Dao Ancestor had refined the Forbidden Void Realm, and no one would suspect her, and in fact, they would not suspect her.

"Brother Ye, I'll transfer half of the authority of the Forbidden Void Realm to you!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"Why, this is the Forbidden Void Realm!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"For me, the Forbidden Void Realm is just like that, and I don't build a force, what's the use of such a Forbidden Void Realm? Besides, it won't be long before I will be promoted to the Strongest Dao Ancestor, and the main body will not be able to enter!

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

After Ouyang Jiu'er's persuasion again and again, Ye Tian finally asked for half of the permission of this forbidden void realm.

To him, the Forbidden Void Realm meant a lot.

He could completely secretly transfer some of the Terran geniuses to the Forbidden Void Realm, and then secretly cultivate the Nine Extremes Legion, even Black Wind Mountain didn't know the strength of the Nine Extremes Legion, these were all his personal strength.

More importantly, the Forbidden Void Realm is very suitable for cultivation, and if the human race cultivates here, the cultivation speed will be very fast.

Next, Ye Tian began to prepare to transfer some of the Terran elites and some of the geniuses of the Nine Extremes Legion and send them into the Forbidden Void Realm.

Ordinary Terran geniuses didn't know what the Forbidden Void Realm was, their level was too low, and they couldn't get in touch with the secrets of the Forbidden Void Realm, which was something that Dao Ancestors cared about.

However, the Nine Extremes Legion had heard of some situations in the Forbidden Void Realm, so they were very surprised, after all, it was rumored that the Forbidden Void Realm had been refined by the Heavenly Emperor Palace, but they did not expect it to fall into Ye Tian's hands.

Suddenly, they admired Ye Tian incomparably, and they were also glad that they were able to enter the Forbidden Void Realm to cultivate.

The other side.

Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

After the discussion of many emperors, they finally agreed to the application of Xuanhe Dao Ancestor, and extracted the soul origin memory of Shi Ying Dao Ancestor, which was the final judgment, and no one could intercede.

On the judgment seat.

An emperor personally extracted the soul origin memory for the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor, and before being extracted from the original memory, the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor begged loudly: "Styx Emperor, it's really not me, please, don't extract my soul origin memory, I can make a natal oath!!!"

And yet useless!

The natal oath is still useful to low-level Dao Ancestors, but it is of little use to the Supreme Dao Ancestor, and although the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor is not the Supreme Dao Ancestor, there is also a way to avoid the Natal Oath.

Therefore, extracting the soul origin memory is the most reliable method, and there is no one.

I saw that the Styx Emperor pressed one hand on the center of the eyebrows of the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor, and began to forcibly extract the soul origin memory of the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor.
